description_long: This is a tall, rounded ceramic vase with a wide mouth and two small, sculpted handles on opposite sides near the rim. The surface is adorned with intricate, hand-drawn motifs in muted blue and reddish-brown tones, featuring stylized birds and swirling botanical patterns. The handles are subtly integrated into the body, each shaped with a slight flourish that blends into the decorative lines. The vase's body tapers smoothly from the broad shoulders to a narrower base, giving it an elegant, classical silhouette. The artwork appears unfinished or sketched, lending an artisanal, antique quality to the piece. The overall finish is matte, with visible texture and slight irregularities that suggest handcrafting.
description: A tall, rounded ceramic vase with sculpted handles and intricate, hand-drawn bird and botanical motifs in blue and reddish-brown. The surface is matte and textured, giving it an artisanal, antique appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights one sculpted handle and swirling botanical motifs, with the mouth and rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view features both handles and a prominent bird motif, with the most detailed artwork visible.
description_view_2: This side shows the opposite handle and more swirling patterns, with less emphasis on the bird motif.
description_view_3: This view displays both handles and a second bird motif, with the artwork wrapping around the vase's body.
attribute_pattern: stylized birds and swirling botanical motifs
